meals.name: Soft-Boiled Egg with Sourdough, Goat Cheese & Strawberries
meals.image_prompt: soft-boiled egg in an egg cup with buttered sourdough soldiers beside it, creamy goat cheese, fresh strawberries on a plate, warm morning light
prep_steps: Boil eggs on Sunday evening to soft consistency (6 min), cool in ice bath, store in shell
day_of_steps: Boil kettle. Toast 40g sourdough. Place soft-boiled egg in cup. Spread 30g goat cheese on toast. Serve with 150g fresh strawberries and 500ml water.

meals.name: Apple & Almonds
meals.image_prompt: fresh apple sliced in half, scattered almonds beside it, on a white plate, natural daylight
day_of_steps: Slice 1 medium apple. Portion 25g raw almonds. Serve with 500ml water.

meals.name: Mediterranean Grilled Chicken with Roasted Vegetables & Couscous
meals.image_prompt: grilled chicken breast sliced, served with golden roasted zucchini and cherry tomatoes, fluffy couscous, lemon wedge, olive oil drizzle, plated on white dish
prep_steps: Season 600g chicken breast with salt, pepper, dried oregano. Grill or pan-sear until cooked through (65°C internal). Cool and slice. Roast 400g zucchini (diced) + 300g cherry tomatoes with 3tsp olive oil, garlic, dried thyme at 200°C for 20 min. Cool and store separately. Cook 150g dry couscous with chicken stock. Cool and store.
day_of_steps: Portion grilled chicken slices (Diego 200g, Diana 150g). Portion roasted vegetables (Diego 200g, Diana 150g). Portion couscous (Diego 80g, Diana 60g cooked). Drizzle with 1tsp fresh lemon juice. Serve with 500ml water.

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Walnuts
meals.image_prompt: creamy Greek yogurt in a bowl topped with crushed walnuts and a drizzle of honey, natural light
prep_steps: Portion Greek yogurt (0% fat) into containers for the week.
day_of_steps: Spoon 180g Greek yogurt into a bowl. Top with 20g raw walnuts. Serve with 500ml water.

meals.name: Pan-Seared White Fish with Roasted Green Beans & New Potatoes
meals.image_prompt: golden pan-seared white fish fillet, roasted green beans with garlic, boiled new potatoes with skin, lemon wedge, parsley garnish, plate with shallow depth of field
prep_steps: Roast 500g green beans with 2tsp olive oil, minced garlic, salt & pepper at 200°C for 15 min until tender. Cool and store. Boil 600g new potatoes (halved) until tender, cool and store.
day_of_steps: Pat 180g white fish fillet (cod or hake) dry. Season with salt, pepper, lemon zest. Sear skin-side down in 1tsp hot olive oil for 4 min until skin is crispy, flip and cook 2 min more (60°C internal). Portion green beans (Diego 180g, Diana 140g). Portion potatoes (Diego 150g, Diana 110g). Serve with lemon wedge and 500ml water.

meals.name: Smoked Salmon & Cream Cheese on Sourdough with Kiwi
meals.image_prompt: sourdough toast topped with smoked salmon, thin cream cheese spread, fresh dill, sliced kiwi fruit on the side, bright morning light
day_of_steps: Toast 40g sourdough. Spread 25g cream cheese. Layer 50g smoked salmon. Garnish with fresh dill. Serve with 2 sliced kiwis (160g total) and 500ml water.

meals.name: Pear & Cashews
meals.image_prompt: ripe pear cut into quarters, raw cashew nuts scattered on a small plate, natural light, minimalist styling
day_of_steps: Cut 1 medium pear into quarters. Portion 25g raw cashews. Serve with 500ml water.

meals.name: Asian Chicken Stir-Fry with Bok Choy, Sesame & Brown Rice
meals.image_prompt: wok-tossed chicken pieces with tender bok choy, sesame seeds, ginger-garlic aroma, served over fluffy brown rice, spring onion garnish
prep_steps: Dice 600g chicken breast. Marinate in soy sauce, ginger, garlic, sesame oil for 2 hrs. Stir-fry in a hot wok until cooked through (70°C), set aside. Cook 200g dry brown rice. Chop 600g bok choy. Store components separately.
day_of_steps: Reheat chicken portion (Diego 200g, Diana 150g) in wok with 600g bok choy, 1tsp sesame oil, soy sauce, and 1tsp sesame seeds. Cook 3 min. Portion cooked rice (Diego 100g, Diana 75g). Combine and serve with 500ml water.

meals.name: Greek Yogurt with Almonds
meals.image_prompt: thick Greek yogurt in a white bowl, toasted slivered almonds on top, drizzle of honey, soft natural light
day_of_steps: Spoon 180g Greek yogurt into a bowl. Top with 20g raw almonds. Serve with 500ml water.

meals.name: Baked Beef & Herb Meatballs with Tomato Sauce & Whole-Grain Pasta
meals.image_prompt: tender beef meatballs in rich tomato sauce, served over whole-grain penne, fresh basil garnish, parmesan shreds, warm white plate
prep_steps: Mix 500g lean ground beef with 30g whole-grain breadcrumbs, 1 egg, minced garlic, salt, pepper, fresh parsley. Form 20 balls. Bake at 200°C for 15 min until cooked (70°C). Simmer in 400ml tomato passata (Pommodoro/Mutti) with garlic and herbs for 10 min. Cool and store. Cook 250g dry whole-grain pasta, cool and store separately.
day_of_steps: Reheat meatballs (Diego 5 balls = 150g, Diana 4 balls = 120g) with sauce. Reheat pasta portion (Diego 120g, Diana 90g cooked). Combine on plate. Top with 10g parmesan shreds. Serve with 500ml water.

meals.name: Poached Egg with Whole-Grain Sourdough, Avocado & Blueberries
meals.image_prompt: silky poached egg on buttered sourdough, sliced avocado fanned beside it, fresh blueberries scattered, runny yolk visible, morning sunlight
day_of_steps: Toast 40g sourdough, butter lightly. Poach 1 egg in simmering water with splash of vinegar (3 min until set). Top toast with 1/4 avocado (sliced). Place egg on top. Serve with 120g fresh blueberries and 500ml water.

meals.name: Orange & Pistachios
meals.image_prompt: fresh orange segments on a white plate, handful of unsalted pistachios, natural daylight, fresh and vibrant
day_of_steps: Peel 1 medium orange, separate into segments. Portion 25g raw pistachios. Serve with 500ml water.

meals.name: Tuna & Chickpea Salad with Roasted Bell Peppers & Lemon-Olive Oil Dressing
meals.image_prompt: flaked tuna and chickpeas mixed with roasted red bell pepper strips, red onion (minced), cherry tomatoes, drizzled with lemon and olive oil, on a bed of mixed greens
prep_steps: Roast 500g red bell peppers (sliced) at 200°C for 20 min with 2tsp olive oil until tender. Cool and store. Drain and flake 3 cans (240g total) tuna in water. Mix with roasted peppers, 250g cooked chickpeas (from canned), minced garlic, salt, pepper. Dress with 2tsp olive oil and lemon juice. Cool and store. Wash and tear 300g mixed salad greens (romaine/spinach mix).
day_of_steps: 🥘 Cook this fresh today — food safety: a Sunday batch of fish seafood only keeps ~2 day(s), and this is day 3. (The dish is unchanged — just cooked the same day.)
Portion tuna-chickpea mixture (Diego 250g, Diana 190g) onto bed of mixed greens (Diego 150g, Diana 120g). Drizzle with 1tsp fresh lemon juice. Serve with 500ml water.
meals.safety_note: 🥘 Cook this fresh today — food safety: a Sunday batch of fish seafood only keeps ~2 day(s), and this is day 3. (The dish is unchanged — just cooked the same day.)

meals.name: Herb-Roasted Chicken with Roasted Zucchini & Sweet Potato
meals.image_prompt: herb-roasted chicken thigh, golden and tender, beside roasted zucchini coins and cubed sweet potato, fresh rosemary sprig, warm plate

day_of_steps: Reheat chicken portion (Diego 220g, Diana 170g). Reheat roasted vegetables (Diego 280g mix, Diana 210g mix). Plate together. Serve with 500ml water.
